title: Align export safety with RepoBrief profiles
goal: Make export safety required/recommended/optional by profile and surface it through profile checks

acceptance.assertion: The slice is implemented or explicitly closed against current main/PR state with no hidden broadening.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: RepoBrief boundaries are preserved: no hidden refresh, no Git mutation in RepoBrief core, no review/runtime correctness claim.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Relevant tests/checks are run, or a precise blocker/gap is recorded.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: The output states what the evidence does not establish.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

metadata.outcome: Verified existing Lenskit export safety alignment with RepoBrief profiles on current main.

verified_acceptance.rbv1-t009-scope-bound: Existing Lenskit main aligns export_safety_report requirements with RepoBrief profiles and surfaces the profile check behavior.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t009-boundary-preserved: The alignment is profile/read-only policy and does not introduce hidden refresh, Git mutation, review verdicts or runtime correctness claims.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t009-tests-or-gap: Targeted profile, export safety, required reading and snapshot CLI tests passed: 87 passed.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t009-non-claims: Export Safety remains diagnostic and does not establish secret absence, PII absence, runtime correctness, test sufficiency, review completeness or merge readiness.
